title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Noise - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Noise - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Noise! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Noise:
Noise is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise!
